tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn module

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_cbpb_init(mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Tests the initialization of CBPB by mocking the parent class initialization.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.stored_manure() → ManureStream

Returns a fixture ManureStream instance representing stored manure.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.received_manure() → ManureStream

Returns a fixture ManureStream instance representing received manure.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.compost_bedded_pack_barn() → CompostBeddedPackBarn

Returns a fixture CBPB.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_process_manure_runs_expected_steps(stored_manure: ManureStream, received_manure: ManureStream, compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Test that the process_manure method runs the expected steps.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_apply_dry_matter_loss_valid(compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn, stored_manure: ManureStream, received_manure: ManureStream, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Ensure solids are updated correctly with valid dry matter loss.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_apply_dry_matter_loss_raises_value_error(compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn, stored_manure: ManureStream, received_manure: ManureStream, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Ensure ValueError is raised and error is logged when losses go below zero.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_apply_nitrogen_losses_valid(compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn, received_manure: ManureStream) → None

Ensure nitrogen losses are applied correctly without error.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_apply_nitrogen_losses_raises_value_error_for_nitrogen_losses(compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn, received_manure: ManureStream, mocker: MockerFixture) → None

Ensure ValueError is raised and error is logged when losses exceed available nitrogen.

tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_nitrous_oxide_emission(compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn, received_nitrogen: float, is_tilled: bool, expected: float) → None
tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_nitrous_oxide_negative_input(compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn) → None
tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_ammonia_emission(compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn, received_nitrogen: float, is_tilled: bool, expected: float) → None
tests.test_biophysical.test_manure.test_storage.test_compost_bedded_pack_barn.test_ammonia_negative_input(compost_bedded_pack_barn: CompostBeddedPackBarn) → None
